page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i3.8xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server powered by an Intel Xeon 8269CY processor running at 2.5 GHz. It features 32 dedicated physical cores with one thread per core, 256.0 GB of system memory providing 8.0 GB per core, and a baseline network bandwidth of 10 Gbps. The server includes a bundled 7679 GB local SSD storage array, with no integrated GPU resources.

Benchmark data indicates a clear performance tradeoff between single-core and multi-core workloads. Single-core performance is weak, as demonstrated by stress-ng single-core and gzip compression tests falling into the bottom 25% tier. Conversely, multi-core operations, including stress-ng multi-core, Passmark CPU, and bzip3 decompression, achieve average tier results. Memory bandwidth for both cached small blocks and uncached large blocks remains in the average tier, alongside Redis SET operations and static web serving throughput.

From a resource density perspective, the server offers high qualitative cost efficiency for workloads requiring substantial local storage capacity coupled with dedicated compute resources. The combination of 7.6 TB of local SSD storage and 256 GB of RAM makes this instance type appropriate for database hosting, large-scale data processing, and storage-intensive applications, though it is less optimal for single-threaded compute tasks.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i3.8xlarge is an x86_64 server configured with 32 dedicated Intel Xeon 8269CY physical cores operating at 2.5 GHz, 256.0 GB of RAM, and a bundled 7679 GB local SSD. It delivers a baseline network bandwidth of 10 Gbps and operates without a GPU. Performance benchmarks reveal a distinct tradeoff: single-core CPU execution and single-threaded gzip compression are weak, placing in the bottom 25% tier, while multi-core CPU execution, memory bandwidth, and database operations perform in the average tier. This resource profile provides high qualitative cost efficiency for storage-heavy deployments. The server is designed for database hosting, storage-intensive workloads, and multi-threaded data processing applications that benefit from large local storage capacity.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i3.8xlarge is an x86_64 server with 32 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 256 GB RAM, and 7679 GB of local SSD storage, delivering average multi-core and database performance.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i3.8xlarge features 32 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 256 GB RAM, and 7679 GB local SSD storage for database and storage workloads.
tagline: A dedicated x86 server featuring massive local SSD storage and balanced multi-core performance for data-intensive workloads.
bullet_points: 32 dedicated Intel Xeon physical cores running at 2.5 GHz
256.0 GB of system memory providing 8.0 GB per core
7679 GB of bundled local SSD storage
Average multi-core and database performance with weak single-core execution
Appropriate for database hosting and storage-intensive applications
